Standard Price: The products are valued at their standard cost defined on the product.
        Average Cost (AVCO): The products are valued at weighted average cost.
        First In First Out (FIFO): The products are valued supposing those that enter the company first will also leave it first.

Rules of origin determine where goods originate, i.e. not where they have been shipped from, but where they have been produced or manufactured.
As such, the ‘origin’ is the 'economic nationality' of goods traded in commerce.
A description of the Product that you want to communicate to your customers. This description will be copied to every Sales Order, Delivery Order and Customer Invoice/Credit Note
